title: RewriteOutput
description: Strict JSON contract returned by the LLM fallback branch of the Query Rewriter (L2). Rule-engine outputs follow the same shape plus richer `trace` metadata.

canonical_query.description: Rewritten, de-pronoun'd query ready for retrieval. Max 60 chars recommended, hard cap 120.

coref_resolved.description: True if at least one pronoun was successfully resolved against history/session slots.

synonyms_expanded.description: OR-expanded domain synonyms (e.g. 内幕交易 → 利用未公开信息交易).

resolved_entities.description: Entities lifted out of history/slots into the rewritten query.

filters.description: Mongo-like hard-filter predicate consumed by L3a (hybrid engine pre-filter).

trace.description: Debug / observability payload. Safe to drop in production.
